final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from the Legend of Sword and Fairy (仙剑奇侠传) IP.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style character design with expressive facial features, soft rounded forms, stylized proportions
Composition: 3x3 grid layout, nine equal panels, each panel framed as if peeking through a torn hole in white paper, consistent head-and-shoulders framing across all panels
Subject: Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) as young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair, round wire-rimmed glasses as base, varying expressions and outfits per panel
Scene/backdrop: plain white background with torn paper hole framing device, consistent across all nine panels
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, warm and approachable mood, gentle shadows defining facial structure
Color palette: vibrant outfit colors as specified (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against neutral white paper backdrop
Text (verbatim): "赵灵儿"
Constraints: maintain consistent character identity across all 9 panels; each panel must show distinct expression and outfit as listed; torn paper hole framing must be identical in all panels
Avoid: realistic photography, anime/manga style, inconsistent character proportions between panels, missing the torn paper framing device, cluttered backgrounds, photorealistic textures

Panel specifications:
- top-left: winking expression, adjusting glasses, green sweater
- top-center: smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
- top-right: thinking expression, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
- middle-left: big smile expression, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
- middle-center: smiling expression, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
- middle-right: neutral expression, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
- bottom-left: happy expression, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
- bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed expression, arms crossed, pink cardigan
- bottom-right: silly expression, poking cheeks, teal sweater
